title: Figure 1 in Molecular characterization and subtype analysis of Blastocystis sp. in captive wildlife in Henan, China
author: Cui, Zhaohui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Phylogenetic relationships among nucleotide sequences of barcode regions of the small subunit ribosomal RNA (SSU rRNA) of Blastocystis sp.; Blastocystis subtypes identified in the present study are indicated in bold type.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Phylogenetic relationships among nucleotide sequences of barcode regions of the small subunit ribosomal RNA (SSU rRNA) of Blastocystis sp.; Blastocystis subtypes identified in the present study are indicated in bold type.
